home.title: Building Communities Where Everyone Belongs Through Sports
home.subtitle: TEAMiN creates inclusive sports environments in Bavaria through our Sport-Assistenz program, connecting people with disabilities to mainstream sports clubs and fostering independence through skilled support.

about.title: Our Mission for Inclusive Sports
about.description: TEAMiN transforms sports culture in Bavaria by creating systematic pathways for inclusion. We believe that sports clubs should be places where everyone can participate, grow, and belong.

spass.title: Sport-Assistenz (SpAss) Program
spass.subtitle: Our structured training program creates skilled assistants who provide temporary support, enabling independent participation in mainstream sports clubs.

features.title: Structured Training
features.description: Comprehensive methodology based on research and best practices for inclusive sports assistance.

features.title: Temporary Support
features.description: Skilled assistance that gradually reduces as independence and club integration develops.

features.title: Sustainable Inclusion
features.description: Long-term integration into mainstream clubs with ongoing community support systems.

athletes.title: For Athletes & Families
athletes.description: We connect people with disabilities and their families to sports opportunities throughout Bavaria, providing the support needed to find your place in mainstream sports clubs.

aurelian.title: Meet Aurelian
aurelian.quote: Through TEAMiN's Sport-Assistenz program, I found not just a sport I love, but a community that embraces me for who I am. The support was there when I needed it, and now I'm proud to call my teammates true friends.
aurelian.attribution: Aurelian, Football Player at FC Würzburg

volunteers.title: Become a Sport Assistant
volunteers.subtitle: Use your unique skills and passion for sports to create meaningful impact. Help others achieve independence while building stronger, more inclusive communities.

benefits.title: Professional Development
benefits.description: Gain certified training in inclusive sports methodology and assistance techniques.

benefits.title: Meaningful Impact
benefits.description: Directly contribute to creating lasting change in your community's sports culture.

benefits.title: Personal Growth
benefits.description: Develop empathy, leadership, and communication skills while building lasting friendships.

benefits.title: Flexible Commitment
benefits.description: Choose your level of involvement based on your schedule and interests.

signup.title: Start Your Journey as a Sport Assistant
signup.subtitle: Join our next training cohort and begin making a difference in your community.

steps.title: Application
steps.description: Complete our simple application form and tell us about your interests.

steps.title: Training
steps.description: Participate in our comprehensive Sport-Assistenz certification program.

steps.title: Match & Start
steps.description: Get matched with athletes and clubs that align with your skills and schedule.

form.interestsPlaceholder: Tell us about your sports background and interests
form.submit: Apply to Become a Sport Assistant

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: Working together with leading organizations to create systematic change in Bavarian sports.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to join the inclusive sports movement? We're here to help athletes, families, volunteers, and clubs connect with the right opportunities.
